## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run build && npx tsc --noEmit && npm run lint` pass
- [ ] `npm test && npm run check:generic && npm run verify:criteria` pass
- [ ] Schema, tests and AUTHORING.md updated if a pane option or widget changed
- [ ] No domain words in `src/core/` or `src/main.ts`; new capabilities sit behind a trust gate
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md entry added under Unreleased/next version
